texto: it takes a village to build success in publishing a book - it takes friends that are willing to help - it takes hours upon hours of no's to get to a yes, it takes many twists and turns with seemingly no end to the detours, it takes courage to face the unknowns - it takes and it takes and it takes - But then, like a flower opening its blossom - it gives.........
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rich Okun: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “it takes a village to build success in publishing a book - it takes friends that are willing to h…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que coragem, author, blossom pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e luto.
